task_children.description: Decision Finalization and Regulatory Frontloading
Finalize Strategic Build Decisions (Level 2 Selection)
Submit Cleaning Agents to Danish EPA for Reuse Certification
Finalize KPI Baseline Reporting Structure with Procurement
Obtain Internal Legal Approval for Stakeholder Contracts
Logistics and Infrastructure Setup (Builder Path Execution)
Negotiate and Execute SLAs with Municipal Waste Authorities (60% Capacity Target)
Secure and Establish Three Centralized Temporary Quality Assessment (QA) Hubs
Procure and Deploy QA Hub Operational Resources (Staffing & Equipment)
Finalize 3rd Party Logistics Contracts for QA Hub Conveyance
Stakeholder Integration and Incentive Framework Development
Define and Communicate Retailer Compliance Floor and Subsidy Structure
Secure Retailer Acknowledgment for Collateral Placement
Finalize Donation Budget Cap and Sweep Trigger Documentation with Finance
Calibrate Tiered Incentive Structure Based on Q2 Pilot Results
Consumer Engagement and Identification Tools Deployment
Develop Provocative Marketing Collateral ('Garden Furniture' Narrative)
Design and Build Social Media Comparative Visual Identification Guide
Develop and Test QR-Code 'Killer Application' Verification Tool
Execute Q2 Pilot Launch of Marketing Campaign and Digital Tools
Pilot Operation and Pre-Rollout Readiness
Conduct Q2 Pilot Collection Across Sample Municipal/Retail Zones
Audit Pilot Performance Against Identification and Compliance Metrics
Obtain EPA Reuse Certification (Dependency Check)
Implement Q2 Learnings into Full National Rollout Procedures
National Rollout and Supply Chain Integration
Execute Nationwide Campaign Launch (Q3 Start)
Manage Daily QA Hub Triage and Cleaning Operations
Conduct System Integration Test: RTSDR to Arla Procurement
Execute Q4 Incentive Uplift if Volume Targets are Lagging
Complete Final Donation Transfer to Arla Foundation (Year-End)
